CheckName: ESC5 Weak ACLs on critical PKI containers
FindingDetail:
Object 'AIA Container' (CN=AIA,CN=Public Key Services,CN=Services,CN=Configuration,DC=sevenkingdoms,DC=local). ACEs:
  NT AUTHORITY\Authenticated Users [GenericRead]
  SEVENKINGDOMS\Cert Publishers [GenericAll]
Remediation: Remove non-admin write rights from critical PKI containers; enable auditing.
Title: Non-admin write rights on PKI object: AIA Container

FindingDetail: Could not read EditFlags for 'SEVENKINGDOMS-CA' (kingslanding.sevenkingdoms.local) via certutil.
Remediation: Run certutil -config 'kingslanding.sevenkingdoms.local\SEVENKINGDOMS-CA' -getreg policy\EditFlags on a host with CA access.
Title: ESC6 manual check: SEVENKINGDOMS-CA

CheckName: ESC7 Weak ACLs on Enterprise CA object
FindingDetail:
CA 'SEVENKINGDOMS-CA' (kingslanding.sevenkingdoms.local). Elevated AD permissions for non-admins. ACEs:
  NT AUTHORITY\Authenticated Users [GenericRead]
  SEVENKINGDOMS\KINGSLANDING$ [CreateChild, DeleteChild, Self, WriteProperty, DeleteTree, Delete, GenericRead, WriteDacl, WriteOwner]
  NT AUTHORITY\Authenticated Users [ExtendedRight]
Remediation: Restrict CA object permissions; review certsrv.msc Security tab.
Title: Non-admin write on CA object: SEVENKINGDOMS-CA

CheckName: ESC8 Web Enrollment over HTTP / relay surface
FindingDetail: CA 'SEVENKINGDOMS-CA' (kingslanding.sevenkingdoms.local). HTTP probe: http://kingslanding.sevenkingdoms.local/certsrv/ HTTPS probe: False
Remediation: Require HTTPS; enable EPA; disable Web Enrollment if unused (KB5005413).
Title: Web Enrollment over HTTP: SEVENKINGDOMS-CA
